display_text: Lifestealer Aghanim's Scepter: Infest can now target enemy heroes for a short duration, attacking from inside while increasing regeneration. This upgrade counters high-mobility and tanky heroes by allowing Lifestealer to bypass frontline defenses and sustain himself while dealing damage from within an enemy.
search_text: Lifestealer Aghanim Scepter Infest enemy heroes counter-mobility sustain inside-attack regeneration

display_text: Lifestealer Aghanim's Shard: Infest explosion applies a 50% duration Open Wounds, enabling stronger crowd control after exiting. This upgrade counters enemy escape attempts and teamfight disengagement by ensuring a follow-up slow on multiple targets.
search_text: Lifestealer Aghanim Shard Infest explosion Open Wounds slow anti-escape crowd control
